agents.prompt: Role Function: design reusable workflow plan and milestones. Usable Tools: requirements docs and planning checklists. Method: milestone-first decomposition.
Role Function: execute planned implementation tasks and produce deliverables. Usable Tools: workspace files and verification scripts. Method: incremental delivery with evidence.
Role Function: own acceptance review and final release decision. Usable Tools: QA checklist and traceability matrix. Method: criteria-first independent verification.

tasks.title: Plan
acceptance: objective: freeze business objective and execution boundaries
input: initial requirement statement and constraints
output: planning notes and milestone table
constraints: no implementation code in this step
exception: unresolved assumptions must be listed with owner
verification: milestones contain owner and completion criteria

tasks.title: Execute
acceptance: objective: produce implementation evidence for agreed scope
input: approved plan and task boundary
output: implementation note and execution evidence
constraints: keep outputs within declared scope
exception: blockers include fallback and impact statement
verification: outputs map to plan acceptance criteria

tasks.title: QA
acceptance: objective: issue final pass or fail acceptance decision
output: final QA checklist and decision record
constraints: independent review with explicit rationale
exception: failed checks include corrective action owner
verification: final decision states pass/fail and blocker status
